title: Glowing Kung Pao Tofu
description: A spicy and savory Chinese-inspired dish made with glowing mushrooms, crispy tofu, and crunchy vegetables.
instructions: 1. Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the ginger and garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
3. Add the glowing mushrooms and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until they release their liquid and start to brown.
4. Add the tofu and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until it is golden brown on all sides.
5. Add the soy sauce, rice vinegar, and kung pao sauce. Stir-fry for 1-2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
6. Add the scallions and pepper. Stir-fry for 1 minute, until they are tender.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve immediately over rice or noodles.
